complaint_pattern: product caused allergic reaction skin rash
solution: Immediately escalate to the Product Safety Team. Request the batch number and manufacturing date. File an adverse event report with the regulatory department.

complaint_pattern: product stopped working defective broken not functioning
solution: Initiate a product replacement process. Send a prepaid return label to retrieve the defective unit for lab testing. Log the defect in the product quality tracker.

complaint_pattern: product quality poor low standard substandard
solution: Escalate to the Quality Control department for batch review. Request photographic evidence from the customer. Schedule a follow-up within 48 hours.

complaint_pattern: product wrong item received incorrect order
solution: Verify order details against warehouse dispatch log. Arrange immediate pickup and correct item re-dispatch. Apply a courtesy discount for the inconvenience.

complaint_pattern: product expired expiry date old stale
solution: Pull the affected batch from inventory immediately. Issue a full refund and replacement. Report to the supply chain team for shelf-life audit.

complaint_pattern: packaging damaged crushed dented broken box
solution: Dispatch a replacement with reinforced bubble-wrap packaging. File a damage claim with the shipping carrier. Review warehouse packing procedures.

complaint_pattern: packaging seal broken leaked leaking open tampered
solution: Check packaging seal integrity logs from the production line. Escalate to the quality control team. Send replacement with tamper-evident packaging.

complaint_pattern: packaging label wrong mislabeled incorrect information
solution: Report to the labeling department for immediate correction. Recall affected batch if safety-critical. Issue corrected product to the customer.

complaint_pattern: packaging missing items incomplete accessories
solution: Cross-check the packing checklist for the SKU. Ship the missing items via express delivery at no extra cost. Update the packing SOP to prevent recurrence.

complaint_pattern: trade dealer distributor not responding support
solution: Contact the regional distribution manager directly. Escalate through the trade partner management portal. Document the communication gap for the quarterly review.

complaint_pattern: trade pricing discrepancy overcharged wrong price
solution: Verify pricing against the current trade agreement. Issue a credit note for the overcharged amount. Update the pricing database if a system error is found.

complaint_pattern: trade shipping delayed late delivery not received
solution: Contact the logistics carrier for a tracking update. Arrange expedited re-shipment if delivery exceeds SLA. Compensate the trade partner per the delay clause.

complaint_pattern: trade cold chain temperature storage conditions
solution: Audit cold-chain storage conditions at the transit warehouse. Request temperature log data from the carrier. Discard any product that breached the safe temperature range.

complaint_pattern: supplement vitamin caused nausea stomach upset side effect
solution: Advise the customer to discontinue use and consult a physician. Log the adverse reaction in the pharmacovigilance system. Request a product sample for lab analysis.

complaint_pattern: cream lotion ointment skin irritation burning redness
solution: Advise immediate discontinuation and application of cold compress. Collect the product batch details for dermatology review. Offer a hypoallergenic alternative.

complaint_pattern: bottle cap loose lid not closing properly
solution: Report to the manufacturing QA team for cap torque testing. Issue replacement units from a verified batch. Update cap-seal specifications if defect rate exceeds 2%.

complaint_pattern: smell odor bad foul rancid sour product
solution: Quarantine the reported batch immediately. Conduct stability testing on retained samples. Issue full refund and replacement from a fresh batch.

complaint_pattern: refund money back return not satisfied unhappy
solution: Process refund within 3-5 business days per company policy. Offer store credit as an alternative with a 10% bonus. Document the reason for return in the CRM.

complaint_pattern: delivery address wrong shipped to incorrect location
solution: Intercept the shipment if still in transit. Arrange re-delivery to the correct address at no charge. Update the customer address in the system.

complaint_pattern: customer service rude unhelpful bad experience support staff
solution: Escalate to the Customer Service Manager for agent review. Offer a sincere apology and a goodwill gesture. Schedule agent retraining on empathy and resolution protocols.

complaint_pattern: Shipment arrived late and product was damaged
solution: jashdashd
